name: AU ixigo Credit Card

rewards.displayRate: 1 reward point per Rs 100 (max 100 points per transaction)

joiningBenefits: Get 1,000 Reward Points (worth Rs 500) on the first successful transaction within 30 days of card issuance
Get Rs 1,000 ixigo money voucher on the first successful transaction within 30 days of card issuance
milestoneBenefits: Earn 5,000 bonus Reward Points (worth up to Rs 2,500) on spending Rs 75,000 or more per calendar quarter
additionalBenefits: Zero payment gateway charges on train bookings made via ixigo and ConfirmTkt (up to 2 bookings per calendar month)
Up to 10% instant discount on domestic/international flights, hotels, and bus bookings via ixigo (once per calendar month)
2 complimentary railway lounge visits per calendar quarter (no spend threshold)
1% fuel surcharge waiver on transactions between Rs 400 and Rs 5,000, capped at Rs 250 per month
additionalDetails: A reward redemption fee of Rs 99 + GST applies per redemption request.
Minimum points required to redeem is 200 Reward Points.
internalNotes: Card details audited and verified against official terms on 2026-06-02.
Reward points are capped at 10,000 points per monthly statement cycle.
UPI transactions done using the RuPay variant earn 5 reward points per Rs 200 spent.
Reward points are not earned on fuel, rent, insurance, wallet, jewellery, education, government, and international transactions.
Telecom, utilities, and insurance transactions earn 1 reward point per Rs 100 spent. Insurance reward points are capped at 100 per transaction.
Complimentary domestic airport lounge access requires a minimum spend of Rs 50,000 in the preceding calendar quarter to unlock 2 visits in the subsequent quarter.
Priority Pass membership can be requested from credit card support; access charges apply for domestic lounges, guest visits, or exceeding the 1 complimentary international visit per year.
